response.justification: The candidate's background is heavily focused on software development, web/mobile applications, and general IT infrastructure rather than hardware optimization, AI accelerators, or SoC/IP modeling. While they demonstrate strong software engineering skills and experience with performance optimization in web contexts, there is no evidence of expertise in deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD optimization, or hardware-software co-design required for the role. Educational background (Bachelor of Science in Computer Science) does not meet the preferred PhD or Master's threshold for this principal-level position.
strengths: Strong software engineering and full-stack development experience with multiple languages and frameworks
Proven track record in performance optimization for web services and real-time systems
Open-source contributions and leadership in community-driven projects (e.g., GISCollective) demonstrating technical depth and engagement
concerns: Lacks direct experience with AI accelerator hardware, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload optimization
No evidence of SIMD/MIMD architecture, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design experience
Education does not meet the principal-level requirements (PhD/Master's preferred or Bachelor's with 8+ years; candidate has Bachelor's with ~13 years experience, which may not suffice)
